prompt: Create an ultra-detailed cinematic portrait of a cute little girl and a golden retriever puppy peeking over an old rustic stone wall together. The girl is on the left and the puppy is on the right, both mostly hidden behind the wall, with only their heads, the girl's small fingers, and the puppy's tiny paws visible resting on the top edge. Use an eye-level camera angle and an intimate centered composition, with exactly two subjects. The stone wall should fill the lower half of the frame, made of rough beige sandstone blocks with visible mortar, cracks, and natural texture. Behind them, show a softly blurred countryside setting with an old stone building on the right, warm greenery on the left, and golden-hour sunlight glowing from the upper left. Use shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, warm amber color grading, realistic fur and hair detail, soft backlighting, gentle rim light, and a wholesome heartwarming mood. The girl should have long brown hair falling forward as she peeks shyly, while the puppy has fluffy golden ears and one paw draped over the wall. Photorealistic, cinematic lens look, 4:5 vertical portrait, no text, no watermark, no extra people or animals.
